image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about microbiome antibiotics impact than social media does.
Context visual: Antibiotics save lives but can disrupt gut bacteria, our microbiome's ecosystem.
Escalation visual: This disruption may lead to digestive issues, allergies, and even obesity!
Evidence visual: Studies show a link between antibiotics and reduced diversity in gut bacteria.
Payoff visual: But not all antibiotics affect everyone the same way—individual responses vary.
Cta visual: Want to keep your microbiome healthy? Talk to your doctor about antibiotics.
